'''Antiquity''' was a [[Mid Rim/Legends|Mid Rim]] [[Planet/Legends|planet]] located in the [[Senex sector/Legends|Senex sector]].

==Geography==
Antiquity was a a muddy world of shallow seas and sheer mountains.<ref name="FT" /> It was a minor [[Agriworld/Legends|agriworld]] located on the [[Belsavis Run]] and ruled by [[House Hax]].<ref name="TEA" /> Sparsely inhabited, the towns of Antiquity were very similar, collections of [[plasticrete]] shelters. Most of the planet's economy was based upon on the growth of [[Teggi fungal root]].<ref name="FT" />

==History==
An [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Unidentified Imperial colonel|Colonel]] hid on the planet after the [[Battle of Endor/Legends|Battle of Endor]]. The [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] organized an [[Mission to Antiquity|operation]] to capture her but the mission failed.<ref name="FT" />

==Appearances==
